kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: If Kingsford does not go with Beatrix, then someone in the North Side goes with Blacksmith.
Either Southgate goes with 7 coins or someone in the Clothiers' Guild goes with Wulfric (but not both).
Everyone in the Joiners' Guild ranks higher in levy than everyone in the Clothiers' Guild.
Exactly one of Wulfric, the Blacksmith, the Fletcher, and the Tanner belongs to the Hill Ward.
Matilda's levy is lower than both the Tanner and the artisan in Millpond.
Either Aldric goes with 10 coins, or Wulfric goes with Riverside — but not both.
Between Bridgegate and Southgate, one goes with Edmund and the other with 10 coins.
At least one of Wulfric, the Blacksmith, and the Weaver belongs to the South Side.
Beatrix goes with exactly two of Blacksmith, Kingsford, and 8 coins.
7 coins, 9 coins, and 12 coins go with Matilda, Fletcher, and Millpond, in some order.
The Blacksmith's levy is higher than both Matilda and the artisan in Riverside.
12 coins goes with either Wulfric or Blacksmith (but not both).
Either Blacksmith goes with Millpond or someone in the Hill Ward goes with 9 coins (but not both).
